exercises.title: Fidelity Calculator
exercises.description: Implement calculations for various gate fidelity metrics.
tasks: Calculate average gate fidelity from Kraus operators
Calculate process (entanglement) fidelity
Convert between F_avg and F_proc
Estimate diamond distance upper bound
Compare metrics for different noise types
hints: Test with depolarizing and amplitude damping

exercises.title: Randomized Benchmarking Simulator
exercises.description: Build a complete randomized benchmarking simulation.
tasks: Generate the single-qubit Clifford group
Create random Clifford sequences with inverses
Simulate RB with various noise models
Fit exponential decay to extract error rate
Verify SPAM independence
exercises.expectedOutput: Working RB simulation with error extraction
hints: 24 single-qubit Cliffords: I, H, S, X compositions
Fit P(m) = A·p^m + B using log-linear regression

exercises.title: Error Budget Analyzer
exercises.description: Create an error budget tool from physical device parameters.
tasks: Input T1, T2, gate times, and other parameters
Calculate contribution from each error source
Visualize error budget breakdown
Compare to error correction threshold
Suggest improvements for largest error sources
hints: Coherent and incoherent errors add differently
Identify which source to improve first

exercises.title: Cross-Platform Benchmarking Tool
exercises.description: Compare error characteristics across qubit technologies.
tasks: Build database of qubit technology parameters
Calculate circuit success probabilities
Determine break-even circuit depths
Account for connectivity and gate time differences
Generate technology comparison report
exercises.expectedOutput: Qubit technology comparison and selection tool
hints: Include: superconducting, trapped ion, neutral atom
Consider both error rates and gate times
